- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] ⚡ Improvement to existing agent
- [ ] 🧪 Adding tests

## ✅ Checklist

### For new agents:
- [ ] Agent is in its own folder under `agents/`
- [ ] Includes a working `app.py` or `agent.py` file
- [ ] Includes a `README.md` with setup instructions
- [ ] Includes a `requirements.txt` with dependencies
- [ ] Code follows PEP 8 style guidelines
- [ ] All API keys use environment variables (no hardcoded secrets)
- [ ] Added agent to the main `README.md` table
- [ ] Tested locally and it runs successfully

### For all PRs:
- [ ] Code is clean and well-documented
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing agents
- [ ] Commit messages are descriptive
